rationale: Section 39.083 governs school district financial management reporting procedures. A homestead exemption increase affects reported tax collection figures but does not conflict with any reporting requirement or procedure in this section.
quote: The annual financial management report must include:
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed change alters data that would appear in reports under §39.083(c)(2)(B) (tax collections) but does not impede or contradict any operative requirement of the statute.
